title: Unique 84916 Number Latex Balloons-12 | Rosegold | 6 Pcs, Rose Gold, Age 21
features: ELEGANT ROSE GOLD DESIGN: Add a touch of sophistication to your celebration with our stunning 21st rose gold latex balloons, perfect for creating an unforgettable atmosphere at your special event.
HIGH-QUALITY LATEX MATERIAL: Our balloons are made from durable, eco-friendly latex, ensuring long-lasting performance and easy inflation with no popping surprises.

VERSATILE CELEBRATION ACCESSORY: Ideal for 21st birthday parties, anniversaries, weddings, or any rose gold-themed event, these balloons are the perfect addition to help create a memorable experience.
EFFORTLESS INFLATION: With a size of 30cm, these balloons are incredibly easy to inflate, making party setup a breeze. Save time and energy on preparation and enjoy your celebration.

IMPRESSIVE 6CT PACK: Each set includes six stunning 21st rose gold latex balloons, ensuring you have enough to create impressive balloon arrangements or to spread throughout your event space for maximum impact.
